description_long: This is a rectangular wooden dining table accompanied by six matching chairs, three on each of the longer sides. The table and chairs feature a striped pattern alternating between lighter and darker wood tones, giving the set a visually striking appearance. The chairs have vertical slats on the backrests and seats, echoing the striped motif of the tabletop. The legs of both the table and chairs are straight and sturdy, with the table supported by four robust legs at each corner. The overall design is simple yet elegant, suitable for communal dining or gathering spaces. The set appears well-crafted, with a focus on both function and visual appeal.
description: A rectangular wooden dining table with six matching striped chairs, featuring a bold alternating wood pattern and vertical slat backs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the table with one chair centered in the foreground and two chairs on each side, highlighting the striped tabletop and slatted chair backs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the table with three chairs visible on each side, emphasizing the symmetry and striped wood pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with a single chair in the foreground and two on each side, showcasing the backrest design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the table's length and arrangement of chairs, with clear visibility of the striped pattern.
